languages.text: "Чорда теряет хватку. Он задействовал связи в {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсисе{/g}, чтобы подсунуть мне отборнейший сброд под видом элитных войск. Что ж, мне остается лишь поблагодарить его за недальновидность. Из тех, кому нечего терять, получаются самые верные слуги, стоит им лишь ощутить на себе хоть каплю господской милости. Вчерашние отбросы станут щитом и мечом династии фон Валанциус и будут преданно служить мне и моим потомкам".

traits.locale_text: "Чорда теряет хватку. Он задействовал связи в {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсисе{/g}, чтобы подсунуть мне отборнейший сброд под видом элитных войск. Что ж, мне остается лишь поблагодарить его за недальновидность. Из тех, кому нечего терять, получаются самые верные слуги, стоит им лишь ощутить на себе хоть каплю господской милости. Вчерашние отбросы станут щитом и мечом династии фон Валанциус и будут преданно служить мне и моим потомкам".

languages.text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."
languages.original_text: "Чорда теряет хватку. Он задействовал связи в {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Каликсисе{/g}, чтобы подсунуть мне отборнейший сброд под видом элитных войск. Why, I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, as soon as they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the shield and the sword of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. languages.text: “库尔达越来越敷衍了。他动用自己在{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}卡利西斯{/g}的关系，塞给我一群彻头彻尾的废物，还想包装成精锐部队。不过，我反倒该感谢他的眼光短浅。那些一无所有的人，只要稍微尝到一点主人的恩惠，就会成为最忠诚的仆从。他们不再是卑贱的渣滓，而会成为冯·瓦兰修斯家族的剑与盾，忠诚地侍奉我和我的后代。”
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

traits.locale_text: “库尔达越来越敷衍了。他动用自己在{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}卡利西斯{/g}的关系，塞给我一群彻头彻尾的废物，还想包装成精锐部队。不过，我反倒该感谢他的眼光短浅。那些一无所有的人，只要稍微尝到一点主人的恩惠，就会成为最忠诚的仆从。他们不再是卑贱的渣滓，而会成为冯·瓦兰修斯家族的剑与盾，忠诚地侍奉我和我的后代。”

languages.text: «Chorda se está descuidando. Usó sus contactos en {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} para enviarme la peor chusma y hacerlos pasar por tropas de élite. Tengo que agradecer su falta de juicio, pues quienes no tienen nada que perder son los sirvientes más fieles una vez catan la benevolencia de su amo. Han dejado de ser chusma y serán la espada y el escudo de la casa von Valancius, fieles a mi servicio y al de mis descendientes».
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

traits.locale_text: «Chorda se está descuidando. Usó sus contactos en {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} para enviarme la peor chusma y hacerlos pasar por tropas de élite. Tengo que agradecer su falta de juicio, pues quienes no tienen nada que perder son los sirvientes más fieles una vez catan la benevolencia de su amo. Han dejado de ser chusma y serán la espada y el escudo de la casa von Valancius, fieles a mi servicio y al de mis descendientes».

languages.text: « Chorda devient négligent. Il a fait jouer ses relations de {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} pour m'obtenir la lie de l'armée, quand bien même il tente de faire passer ces soldats pour des troupes d'élite. Mais son manque de discernement joue à mon avantage. Ceux qui n'ont rien à perdre deviennent les plus fidèles des serviteurs, dès lors que leur maître leur témoigne la moindre marque de faveur. Ce ne sont plus des criminels de bas étage, mais l'épée et le bouclier de la maison von Valancius, attachés à mon service et à celui de mes descendants. »
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

traits.locale_text: « Chorda devient négligent. Il a fait jouer ses relations de {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} pour m'obtenir la lie de l'armée, quand bien même il tente de faire passer ces soldats pour des troupes d'élite. Mais son manque de discernement joue à mon avantage. Ceux qui n'ont rien à perdre deviennent les plus fidèles des serviteurs, dès lors que leur maître leur témoigne la moindre marque de faveur. Ce ne sont plus des criminels de bas étage, mais l'épée et le bouclier de la maison von Valancius, attachés à mon service et à celui de mes descendants. »

languages.text: "Chorda, baştan savma davranıyor. Seçkin birlikler olarak yutturmaya çalıştığı artıkları bana vermek için {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} bağlantılarını kullandı. Ancak bu düşüncesizliği için ona yalnızca teşekkür edebilirim. Kaybedecek hiçbir şeyi olmayanlar, efendilerinin lütuflarının zerresini hissettiklerinde en sadık hizmetkârlar olur. Artık aşağılık pislikler değiller... Benim ve evlatlarımın sadık hizmetinde, von Valancius Hanesi'nin kılıcı ve kalkanı olacaklar."
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

traits.locale_text: "Chorda, baştan savma davranıyor. Seçkin birlikler olarak yutturmaya çalıştığı artıkları bana vermek için {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} bağlantılarını kullandı. Ancak bu düşüncesizliği için ona yalnızca teşekkür edebilirim. Kaybedecek hiçbir şeyi olmayanlar, efendilerinin lütuflarının zerresini hissettiklerinde en sadık hizmetkârlar olur. Artık aşağılık pislikler değiller... Benim ve evlatlarımın sadık hizmetinde, von Valancius Hanesi'nin kılıcı ve kalkanı olacaklar."

languages.text: "Chorda wird schlampig. Er hat seine Verbindungen nach {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} genutzt, um mir Gesindel als Elitetruppen zu verkaufen. Aber ich kann ihm für sein mangelndes Urteilsvermögen nur danken. Leute, die nichts mehr zu verlieren haben, sind die treuesten Diener, sobald sie auch nur einen Funken Wohlwollen ihres Meisters spüren. Dieser vormals niedere Abschaum wird Schwert und Schild von Haus von Valancius sein und mir und meinen Nachkommen treue Dienste leisten."
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

Dieser vormals niedere Abschaum wird Schwert und Schild von Haus von Valancius sein und mir und meinen Nachkommen treue Dienste leisten."

languages.text: 「コルダも詰めが甘くなったものだ。奴は{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}キャリクシス{/g}の伝手を使って、私に正真正銘の屑どもを寄こし、それを精鋭部隊と偽ろうとした。だが、その判断力のなさには、感謝するほかない。失うもののない者ほど、主君の恩寵をほんのわずかでも感じれば、この上なく忠実な僕となるのだ。もはや卑しい屑ではなく、彼らはフォン・ヴァランシウス家の剣となり盾となり、私とわが子孫に忠実に仕えるであろう」
languages.original_text: "Chorda is getting sloppy. He used his {g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}Calixis{/g} connections to give me utter dregs, whom he tried to pass off as elite troops. But I can only thank him for his lack of judgement. Those with nothing to lose make the most loyal servants, once they feel but a modicum of their master's good graces. Lowly scum no more, they will be the sword and shield of House von Valancius, in faithful service to me and my descendants."

traits.locale_text: 「コルダも詰めが甘くなったものだ。奴は{g|Encyclopedia:CalixisGlossary}キャリクシス{/g}の伝手を使って、私に正真正銘の屑どもを寄こし、それを精鋭部隊と偽ろうとした。だが、その判断力のなさには、感謝するほかない。失うもののない者ほど、主君の恩寵をほんのわずかでも感じれば、この上なく忠実な僕となるのだ。もはや卑しい屑ではなく、彼らはフォン・ヴァランシウス家の剣となり盾となり、私とわが子孫に忠実に仕えるであろう」
